title: ICSI's Latest Representation to MCA: Addressing Practical Hurdles (March 20, 2026)
content:
# ICSI's Latest Representation to MCA: Addressing Practical Hurdles (March 20, 2026)

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) ne Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) ko March 20, 2026, ko ek representation submit kiya hai, jismein companies aur professionals ko faced ho rahi key practical challenges highlight kiye gaye hain. Yeh representation Companies Act, 2013 ke compliance se jude kuch khaas muddo par focus karta hai.

Yahaan kuch major compliance issues diye gaye hain jo ICSI ne MCA ke saamne rakhe hain:

*   **Conversion of Private to Public Company:** Bahut confusion hai ki conversion actually kab effective hota hai – application date se ya jab Registrar of Companies (ROC) approve karta hai. Iss lack of clarity se legal problems ho sakti hain.
*   **Shifting Registered Office (within state):** Agar company apna registered office same state ke andar hi shift karti hai, tab bhi Regional Director (RD) ka approval maanga jaata hai agar ROC jurisdiction change ho. Yeh process ko unneccesarily complicated bana deta hai.
*   **E-Filing vs. Physical Documents:** Aaj kal sab kuch digital ho gaya hai, but still, authorities kuch cases mein physical documents maangte hain. Isse e-filing ka purpose defeat hota hai aur extra work badh jaata hai.
*   **BEN Forms:** Kaafi companies ko in forms ko file karne mein delays hue, especially COVID-19 disruptions ke baad. ICSI ne ek Amnesty Scheme propose ki hai taaki companies heavy penalties ke bina filing kar sakein.
*   **Section 122(8) Proceedings:** Kabhi-kabhi, penalties sirf isliye lag jaati hain kyunki official notices undeliverable the. Isse fairness par sawaal uthte hain, kyunki companies ko notice mila hi nahi hoga.
*   **Stamp Duty on Securities:** Different authorities ke beech confusion ki wajah se often double payment of stamp duty ho jaati hai aur unnecessary legal battles shuru ho jaati hain.

ICSI ki yeh representation industry ki taraf se aayi practical difficulties ko highlight karti hai aur MCA se reforms ki appeal karti hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Visit the Official ICSI Website for Updates](https://www.icsi.edu/)

*Published on: 21 March 2026*
